title: Watumba bat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|They're watumba bats, you big baby. They eat algae, insects, and fire, not Wookiees.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]|<ref name="The New Rebellion">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>}}
'''Watumba bats''' were flying animals that lived in nests. They ate fire, [[Algae/Legends|algae]], insects, and rock dust. [[Glottalphib]]s considered them to be a great delicacy and liked to keep them, although this was at great risk to themselves as the bats would kill the Glottalphibs to eat their fire if enraged.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
